hero.badge: We handle payments. You handle business.
hero.subtitle: Alipay, WeChat, bank transfer or cash. You send in CFA francs, your supplier receives in yuan. With the proof in your pocket.

steps.title: Choose
steps.desc: Alipay, WeChat, bank transfer or cash. Based on your supplier's preference.

steps.title: Amount
steps.desc: In XAF or yuan. The instant rate is displayed, optimized by volume.

steps.title: Beneficiary
steps.desc: QR code, ID or bank details. Saved for next time.

steps.title: Instant
steps.desc: Your supplier receives the funds immediately. Payment proof in the app.

alipay.name: Alipay
alipay.desc: QR code or ID. Instant payment to any Alipay account in China.

wechat.name: WeChat Pay
wechat.desc: Through the WeChat ecosystem. Ideal for suppliers who use WeChat daily.

bankTransfer.name: Bank Transfer
bankTransfer.desc: Directly to your supplier's bank account. For large orders.

cash.name: Cash
cash.desc: Cash delivery with receipt signature. For suppliers who prefer cash.

items.a: Yes. Alipay and WeChat payments are processed in minutes. Bank transfers usually take a few hours. Cash is immediate.
10,000 XAF per transaction. No maximum, but larger amounts get a better rate.
The base rate depends on the payment method. An adjustment applies based on your country. The higher the amount, the better the rate.

items.q: How does my supplier know they've been paid?
items.a: You receive payment proof in the app: screenshot for Alipay/WeChat, confirmation for transfers, signature for cash.
None. The displayed rate is the final rate. Zero additional commission, zero surprises.

items.q: In which countries is Bonzini available?
items.a: Cameroon, Gabon, Chad, Central African Republic and Congo.

cta.title: Your suppliers are waiting
cta.subtitle: Every minute counts in business. Send your first payment now.

footer.tagline: Instant payments to China for CEMAC zone importers.
